# Choose Like Buddha

> {{ site.description }}

Choose Like Buddha is a free mobile app (iOS and Android) that helps people train their minds to respond rather than react, through short daily mindful-decision exercises inspired by Buddhist wisdom. The app presents real-life situations with two plausible answers — the common-sense choice and the mindful choice — and tracks growth across 8 core Buddhist concepts.

## App

- App name: {{ site.app_name }}
- Price: {{ site.app_price }}
- iOS App Store: {{ site.appstore_link }}
- Google Play: {{ site.playstore_link }}
- Website: {{ site.url }}

## Core features

- **Ask Buddha** — describe any situation and receive AI-generated guidance inspired by Buddhist teachings.
- **Daily mindful questions** — pick between a reactive answer and a mindful one across everyday scenarios.
- **Practice Map** — radar chart tracking growth across 8 Buddhist concepts: Compassion, Patience, Letting Go, Mindfulness, Right Speech, Acceptance, Kindness, and Wisdom.
- **Breathing techniques** — four guided practices: Sama (Box) Breathing, Ānāpānasati, Mettā, and Vase Breathing. Sama is free; the others are part of the Enlightened Path.
- **Progress tracking** — streaks, levels, and gentle daily reminders.

- [Home]({{ site.url }}/): App overview and download links.

- [Box Breathing]({{ site.url }}/box-breathing/): Sama breathing explained.
- [Blog]({{ site.url }}/blog/): "What Would Buddha Do" — real-life situations explored through Buddhist wisdom.

## About the project

Choose Like Buddha is built and maintained by a single independent developer. The app is free, ad-free, privacy-respecting, and designed around the idea that small daily moments of awareness lead to calmer, wiser choices over time.

- Email: {{ site.email_address }}
